name: madison-command-center
description: Madison Command Center — single-repo: Express BFF serves the built React frontend on one port.

scripts.install:all: cd frontend && pnpm install && cd ../backend && npm install
scripts.build: cd frontend && pnpm install && pnpm build
scripts.serve: npm run build && npm run start
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.test:frontend: cd frontend && npx tsc -b --noEmit && npm run test
